name: alpha_002_roa_gpm_rev
expr: rank(add(multiply(0.4, ts_zscore(ts_backfill(roa, 252), 252)), multiply(0.3, ts_zscore(ts_backfill(gross_margin, 252), 252)), multiply(0.3, reverse(ts_zscore(ts_mean(returns, 10), 40)))))

name: alpha_003_gpoa_turn_rev
expr: rank(add(multiply(0.35, ts_zscore(ts_backfill(gpoa, 252), 252)), multiply(0.35, ts_zscore(ts_backfill(asset_turnover, 252), 252)), multiply(0.3, reverse(ts_zscore(ts_mean(returns, 15), 60)))))

name: alpha_005_quality_blend_rev
expr: rank(add(multiply(0.2, ts_zscore(ts_backfill(roe, 252), 252)), multiply(0.2, ts_zscore(ts_backfill(roa, 252), 252)), multiply(0.2, ts_zscore(ts_backfill(gpoa, 252), 252)), multiply(0.2, ts_zscore(ts_backfill(gross_margin, 252), 252)), multiply(0.2, reverse(ts_zscore(ts_mean(returns, 20), 80)))))

name: alpha_006_stable_quality_rev
expr: rank(add(multiply(0.3, reverse(ts_std_dev(ts_backfill(roe, 252), 126))), multiply(0.3, reverse(ts_std_dev(ts_backfill(roa, 252), 126))), multiply(0.2, ts_zscore(ts_backfill(asset_turnover, 252), 252)), multiply(0.2, reverse(ts_zscore(ts_mean(returns, 12), 50)))))
